sections.heading: Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing The Not Project, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

sections.heading: User Accounts
sections.content: To save stories, you must create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and for all activities under your account.

sections.heading: Story Propositions
sections.content: Users may submit story topics or suggestions. By submitting, you acknowledge that these are suggestions for our editorial team and do not grant you ownership or creative control over the final content produced.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
sections.content: All stories, multimedia, and code on thenotproject.com are the property of The Not Project unless otherwise stated. Content may not be reproduced without explicit permission.

sections.heading: Termination
sections.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at our discretion, without notice, for conduct that we believe violates these terms or is harmful to other users.

sections.heading: Disclaimer of Warranties
sections.content: The service is provided on an 'as is' and 'as available' basis. We make no warranties regarding the accuracy of stories or the uninterrupted availability of the website.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: The Not Project shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service or inability to access your saved stories.

sections.heading: Changes to Terms
sections.content: We may modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the site after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.content: Questions regarding these terms should be directed to contact@thenotproject.com.
